div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 223px; margin-left: 351px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Comprador iOS/Android. Pesquisa produtos, gerencia carrinho e finaliza pedidos via app nativo.

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(8, 63, 117), rgb(149, 196, 242)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(6, 49, 92), rgb(168, 205, 242));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(8, 63, 117), rgb(149, 196, 242)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(6, 49, 92), rgb(168, 205, 242));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(8, 63, 117), rgb(149, 196, 242)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(6, 49, 92), rgb(168, 205, 242));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 223px; margin-left: 1011px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Comprador via navegador. Acessa SPA React para navegar catálogo, comparar produtos e realizar compras.

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(8, 63, 117), rgb(149, 196, 242)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(6, 49, 92), rgb(168, 205, 242));

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(8, 63, 117), rgb(149, 196, 242)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(6, 49, 92), rgb(168, 205, 242));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(8, 63, 117), rgb(149, 196, 242)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(6, 49, 92), rgb(168, 205, 242));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 223px; margin-left: 1721px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Operador interno. Gerencia catálogo, preços, pedidos e regras de negócio via portal administrativo.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-end; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1972px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1709px; margin-left: 280px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
text-align: left
text-align: left

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 538px; height: 1px; padding-top: 455px; margin-left: 831px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Único ponto de entrada para clientes externos. Responsável por autenticação JWT, rate limiting, roteamento por path e terminação TLS.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 745px; margin-left: 431px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Cadastro e autenticação de clientes. Gerencia perfis, tokens JWT e login social via OAuth 2.0 (Google/Apple).

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 745px; margin-left: 1441px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Catálogo dinâmico de produtos tech. Sincronização em tempo real com fornecedores, motor de preços dinâmicos e indexação para busca.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 745px; margin-left: 761px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Ciclo de vida do carrinho de compras: adição/remoção de itens, snapshot de preços, reserva temporária de estoque e início do checkout.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 455px; margin-left: 1851px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Orquestração de pedidos via padrão Saga (PENDING → CONFIRMED → SHIPPED). Integração com gateway de pagamento e gestão de reembolsos.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1385px; margin-left: 1851px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Filtragem colaborativa e ranking personalizado de produtos. Consome eventos de comportamento (cart-events, order-events) via Kafka para atualizar modelos ML.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1175px; margin-left: 1851px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Consumidor Kafka dedicado. Entrega e-mails transacionais, push notifications e SMS para clientes. Gestão de templates e histórico de entregas.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 963px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1425px; margin-left: 396px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Event bus assíncrono. Tópicos: order-events | cart-events | catalog-updates | user-events | payment-events. Retenção 7 dias. Schema Registry para contratos de evento.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 988px; margin-left: 301px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Dados de conta, credenciais e perfis. Migração via Flyway. Redis para tokens JWT e lista de revogação de sessões.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 988px; margin-left: 1161px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: MongoDB para documentos flexíveis de produto (specs variam por categoria). Elasticsearch para busca full-text e facetada. Redis para cache de disponibilidade (TTL 60s).

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 988px; margin-left: 631px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Redis como store primário (TTL 30 min por sessão). PostgreSQL para snapshots de carrinhos abandonados e auditoria. Chave: cart:{customerId}.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 728px; margin-left: 1931px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Fonte da verdade para pedidos e pagamentos. Transações ACID completas. Tabelas: orders, order_items, order_audit_log. Migrations via Flyway.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 162, 217), rgb(29, 138, 185)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 125, 173), rgb(69, 164, 206));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1618px; margin-left: 1866px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: MongoDB para documentos de interação usuário-produto (treinamento ML). Redis para serving de scores pré-computados em baixa latência.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 665px; margin-left: 2295px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Processa transações de crédito, débito e Pix via API REST e confirma via webhooks. (Stripe / PagSeguro)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 865px; margin-left: 2295px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Sistemas dos fornecedores que enviam atualizações de estoque e preços em tempo real via REST e webhooks.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1175px; margin-left: 2295px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Entrega transacional de e-mails (confirmação de pedido, recuperação de senha, promoções). SendGrid / AWS SES.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 625px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Autenticação social (Google, Apple ID). Reduz fricção no cadastro via OAuth 2.0 / OIDC.
